# Implementation Plan: Custom AI model management for chat

**Branch**: `004-custom-ai-models` | **Date**: 2026-03-29 | **Spec**: [`spec.md`](./spec.md)
**Input**: Feature specification from `specs/004-custom-ai-models/spec.md`

**Note**: Generated by `/speckit.plan`. Phase 0вЂ“1 artifacts: [`research.md`](./research.md), [`data-model.md`](./data-model.md), [`quickstart.md`](./quickstart.md), [`contracts/`](./contracts/).

## Summary

Deliver **device-local custom chat models** in the Singapur Cards desktop app: users select from **saved** entries (identifier + title + provider), add and manage via a **dedicated Models page** accessible from the main navigation, provider chosen from a fixed **`SUPPORTED_PROVIDERS`** dropdown (no free-text), persist in **SQLite** (existing `singapur_cards.db` via `rusqlite` + new Tauri commands), remove via per-row delete on the Models page. Enforce **FR-007** (trim + case-insensitive uniqueness vs saved entries), **FR-013** ordering (saved entries by title), **FR-012** fallback (first model in FR-013 order; see [`research.md`](./research.md)). Wire state in [`ChatPage.tsx`](../../apps/desktop/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx) and [`ChatComposer.tsx`](../../apps/desktop/src/components/molecules/ChatComposer.tsx); add [`ModelsPage.tsx`](../../apps/desktop/src/pages/ModelsPage.tsx); extend tests in [`ChatPage.test.tsx`](../../apps/desktop/src/test/ChatPage.test.tsx).

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: TypeScript 5.6+ / React 18.3
**Primary Dependencies**: Tauri 2, Vite 6, Semantic UI React 2.1, styled-components 6, @assistant-ui/react, react-router-dom 6, zustand
**Storage**: SQLite via existing `rusqlite` connection in `AppState`; new `custom_chat_models` table added via migration in `schema.rs`; no new Rust or npm dependencies
**Testing**: Vitest 4 + Testing Library (`npm test` in `apps/desktop`)
**Target Platform**: Tauri v2 desktop (macOS primary per team usage)
**Project Type**: desktop-app (web UI + Tauri shell)
**Performance Goals**: Model list load/build < 100ms on typical machines for hundreds of entries (informal); no blocking main thread on persist
**Constraints**: Offline-capable chat UI; local data in app-owned SQLite DB; graceful degradation if Tauri command fails (per spec edge cases)
**Scale/Scope**: Unbounded custom count per spec; UI remains scrollable; no sync across devices

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design.*

| Principle | Status | Evidence |
|-----------|--------|----------|
| I. Desktop-first | Pass | Models page + dropdown + keyboard-focusable controls; no mobile-only pattern |
| II. Local data safety | Pass | Append-only inserts; delete only on explicit user action; no silent wipe of custom list |
| III. Stable offline | Pass | No network required for model list; OpenRouter only when sending messages (unchanged) |
| IV. Basic quality gates | Pass | Extend RTL tests for selector + Tauri invoke mocks; document manual steps in `quickstart.md` |
| V. Keep it simple | Pass | No new npm or Rust deps; existing `rusqlite` + `AppState` pattern; new Tauri commands follow established project conventions |

**Post-design (Phase 1)**: Same table; contracts and `data-model.md` document validation and error paths. No violations; **Complexity tracking** left empty.

в””в”Ђв”Ђ src/test/

**Structure Decision**: All new logic lives under `apps/desktop/src/features/chat/` except UI composition in `ModelsPage` and state in `ChatPage`, matching existing chat feature boundaries.
